entries.title: Billing and Coding: Radiation Therapies
entries.summary: High-signal revision from CMS notes: The effective date for revision 9 should be retroactive effective for dates of service on or after 1/1/26 not 4/1/26.

entries.title: Self-Administered Drug Exclusion List:
entries.summary: High-signal revision from CMS notes: Under Excluded CPT/HCPCS Codes – Table Format added C9399, J3490, J3590 for Nemluvio (nemolizumab-ilto) and deleted the asterisk for Skyrizi™ (risankizumab-rzaa) using CPT codes C9399, J3490, J3590.
